title: ISO: An RLVR-Native Optimization Stack
innovation_summary: ISO: An RLVR-Native Optimization Stack: Building on our prior analysis (Zhu et al., 2025), we study this missing layer through the singular structure of model weights and identify spectral inheritance: RLVR.
